devd_backlog_export.description: READ: Export the project backlog in an LLM-friendly format — md (default) | json | yaml. Default status filter is new,refined (sprint-bound status excluded); narrow further via status (single or comma-list). Full triage context in one call. GET /api/backlog-export. Read-only.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

status.description: Status filter (single or comma-list); default new,refined

devd_backlog_list.description: DD2-110: List the REAL backlog of a project — open, unplanned work only. Backlog = status "new" OR (status "planned" AND no sprint assigned), mirroring the TUI backlog view (messages.go). Unlike devd_issue_list (which returns ALL issues when unfiltered), this captures the backlog semantics in one call (two backend queries, merged + deduped). refined is excluded (roadmap/milestone-managed). Each item has `key`. Read-only.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

search.description: Full-text search across title, context_notes, goal, background

devd_dashboard_home.description: READ: Global home dashboard — one tile row per non-archived project (open sprints/milestones/issues counts). GET /api/dashboard/home. Global, read-only.

devd_dependencies_graph.description: READ: Issue dependency graph for a project ({nodes, edges}); optionally scoped to one sprint. GET /api/dependencies/graph. Read-only.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

sprint_key.description: Optional sprint key/id to scope the graph

devd_document_create.description: WRITE: Attach a markdown document to a milestone or sprint. title required; body (markdown, DB-blob) + file_path optional.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

sprint_key.description: Owner: Sprint-Key/-id (ODER milestone_id)

devd_document_delete.description: WRITE: Delete a document by id (scoped to its milestone/sprint owner).

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

sprint_key.description: Owner: Sprint-Key/-id (ODER milestone_id)

devd_document_get.description: READ: Get one document (with markdown body) by id, scoped to its milestone/sprint owner. Read-only.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

sprint_key.description: Owner: Sprint-Key/-id (ODER milestone_id)

devd_document_list.description: READ: List markdown documents attached to a milestone or sprint (id DESC). Owner = milestone_id OR sprint_key. Read-only.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

sprint_key.description: Owner: Sprint-Key/-id (ODER milestone_id)

devd_document_update.description: WRITE: Partial update of a document (at least one of title/body/file_path). PUT /api/{milestones|sprints}/:id/documents/:docId.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

sprint_key.description: Owner: Sprint-Key/-id (ODER milestone_id)

devd_issue_activity.description: Audit-log activity for an issue (newest first): timestamp, agent_id, action, old/new value. GET /api/backlog/:id/activity. Read-only.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_issue_assign_sprint.description: WRITE: Assign an issue to a sprint, or unassign (sprint_key=null). Wraps PATCH /api/backlog/:id/sprint.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

id_or_key.description: Issue key (e.g. "DD-42") or numeric backlog id

sprint_key.description: Sprint key (e.g. "DD#20"), numeric sprint id, or null to unassign

devd_issue_bulk.description: WRITE: Bulk action on many issues. action ∈ set_status | set_sprint | cancel | soft_delete | add_tags | remove_tags. ids accept keys or numeric ids (resolved). Per action: set_status→status; set_sprint→sprint_key; cancel→notes; add_tags/remove_tags→tags (names). Lifecycle/ownership validated server-side; returns {ok, failed}.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

sprint_key.description: set_sprint: sprint key/id, or "null"/"none" to unassign

devd_issue_bulk_create.description: WRITE: Create many issues in ONE project. Each item is a single atomic POST (devd_issue_create_full semantics). Returns per-item { index, id, key, status, assigned_sprint } or { index, error, title }. Per-item failures are non-fatal — iteration continues.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_issue_create.description: WRITE: Create a new issue in a specific project backlog.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

po_notes.description: PO free-text notes — the PO-facing free-text field (replaces the removed description field, DD2-131/132).

devd_issue_create_full.description: WRITE: Create an issue with refinement fields (goal, background, context_notes, relevant_files, po_notes), optional sprint-assign and target_status — in ONE atomic API call. po_notes is the PO-facing free-text field (replaces the removed description field, DD2-131/132). E01/D09: per-issue acceptance_criteria + test_instruction are replaced by user_stories[].qa — add them after creation via devd_user_story_add.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

context_notes.description: Implementation context and notes. Per-US QA goes into user_stories[].qa (devd_user_story_add).

relevant_files.description: JSON array or comma-list of file paths

sprint_key.description: Sprint key (e.g. "DD#20") to assign right away

target_status.description: Target status after creation (default new). refined requires goal+background.

devd_issue_delete.description: WRITE: Delete an issue. Without force the backend returns 409 (use status=cancelled instead). force=true hard-deletes (cascades dependencies + reviews). DELETE /api/backlog/:id.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

force.description: Hard-delete (default false → 409 with a hint to cancel)

devd_issue_dep_add.description: WRITE: Add a dependency edge — issue depends_on another issue (depends_on must finish first → it blocks issue). Self-reference, duplicate and cycles are rejected by the backend. Same-project only (keys resolve within the project). Accepts issue keys (e.g. "MEM-9") or numeric ids.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

issue.description: The dependent issue (key or numeric id)

depends_on.description: The issue it depends on / is blocked by (key or numeric id)

devd_issue_dep_list.description: List dependencies of an issue: blockers (issues it depends on) + blocked_by (issues that depend on it). Read-only.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_issue_dep_remove.description: WRITE: Remove the dependency edge issue→depends_on. Resolves the edge id internally. Same-project only. Accepts keys or numeric ids.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

issue.description: The dependent issue (key or numeric id)

depends_on.description: The depended-on issue (key or numeric id)

devd_issue_list.description: List backlog issues for a specific project. Server-side filters: status, type, sprint, search. Each item has `key` (e.g. "DD-42"). Read-only.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

sprint_key.description: Filter by sprint key (e.g. "DD#20"), numeric id, or "null"/"none" for unassigned

status.description: Filter by issue status. Single value (new) or comma-list (new,refined). Valid: new | refined | planned | in_progress | to_review | passed | rejected | completed | cancelled

search.description: Full-text search across title, context_notes, goal, background

fields.description: DD-620: compact (default — identity/status fields only, token-safe) or full (every field; use devd_issue_show for one issue instead).

offset.description: DD-622: skip the first N rows (pagination)

devd_issue_lost.description: DD-555: Find lost issues — non-terminal issues (status ∉ completed/passed/cancelled) still assigned to a COMPLETED sprint. Data-hygiene query, project-scoped. Each hit has issue key, sprint key and status. Read-only.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_issue_move.description: WRITE: Move an issue to another project (gets a new project_number/key there). Blocked while in_progress/to_review. POST /api/backlog/:id/move.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_issue_set_result.description: WRITE: Set the structured sprint result on an issue. Builds the YAML+Markdown result string and writes it via PUT /api/backlog/:id {result}. commits is required (D02). Use after sprint work is done, before sprint complete.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

id_or_key.description: Issue key (e.g. "DD-42") or numeric backlog id

outcome_type.description: Outcome type: feat | fix | refactor | chore | docs (default: feat)

outcome_summary.description: Short summary of what was achieved (required)

commits.description: List of commit SHAs or short descriptions (required — D02)

breaking_changes.description: Whether this introduces breaking changes (default false)

vorgehen.description: Markdown body: approach, trade-offs, code snippets, links

devd_issue_show.description: Get full details of a single issue including tasks, feedback, attachments, tags. Read-only.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

id_or_key.description: Issue key (e.g. "DD-42", "MBT-7") or numeric backlog id

devd_issue_status.description: WRITE: Transition an issue to a new status. Full lifecycle: new → refined → planned → in_progress → to_review → passed → completed. Also: rejected → in_progress (re-open after review); cancelled (from any non-completed state). Notes are required when cancelling.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

id_or_key.description: Issue key (e.g. "DD-42") or numeric backlog id

new_status.description: Target status: new | refined | planned | in_progress | to_review | passed | rejected | completed | cancelled

devd_issue_tag_remove.description: WRITE: Remove the given tag names from an issue (keeps the rest). Fetches the current tags, subtracts, and writes the remaining set. PUT /api/backlog/:id/tags.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

tags.description: Tag names to remove (array or comma string)

devd_issue_tag_set.description: WRITE: Replace ALL tags on an issue with the given tag names (full set; empty array clears). Names are resolved to ids against the project tags; unknown names are reported, not auto-created. PUT /api/backlog/:id/tags.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

tags.description: Tag names (array or comma string); [] / "" clears all

devd_issue_update.description: WRITE: Update editable fields of an issue (title, goal, background, context_notes, relevant_files, priority, type, po_notes, result). po_notes is the PO-facing free-text field (replaces the removed description field, DD2-131/132). result documents the sprint outcome — required on completed/passed issues before sprint complete. E01/D09: per-issue acceptance_criteria + test_instruction are replaced by user_stories[].qa — manage them via devd_user_story_*. Does NOT change status or sprint assignment — use devd_issue_status for status transitions.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

id_or_key.description: Issue key (e.g. "DD-42") or numeric backlog id

result.description: Sprint outcome documentation. Required on completed/passed issues before sprint complete. Markdown text — summarise what was implemented, decisions made, and lessons learned.

devd_memory_tag_create.description: WRITE: Register a new allowed tag (Controlled Vocabulary). Required before a memory may use it once the register is non-empty (hard-block enforcement). Check devd_memory_tag_list first to avoid synonyms.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

tag.description: Tag token (alphanumeric start, . _ - allowed, NO spaces, max 40)

description.description: What this tag means / when to use it

devd_memory_tag_delete.description: WRITE: Remove a tag from the register. Returns usage_count (how many active memories still carry it) as a guard — those memories keep the literal token but it will fail re-validation on next edit.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_memory_tag_list.description: List the curated tag register for a project (Controlled Vocabulary for project_memories tags). Optional FTS filter. Each row carries usage_count (active memories using it). Use this to pick valid tags BEFORE logging a memory. Read-only.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_memory_tag_prune.description: WRITE: Strip every token that is NOT in the register from all active memories (migration cleanup for the singleton-drop decision). Idempotent. Returns { touched }. Run AFTER seeding the register + folding synonyms via devd_memory_tag_rename.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_memory_tag_rename.description: WRITE: Rename a register tag, doubling as MERGE: folds <old> into <new> across all memories (repoints + dedupes tokens). If <new> already exists it merges; otherwise it renames. Use for synonym cleanup (gf2/GF-2/greenfield → gf-2).

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

old.description: Existing register tag to fold away

devd_milestone_activity.description: READ: Milestone audit-log activity (newest first). GET /api/milestones/:id/activity.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_milestone_close.description: WRITE: Close a milestone, handling its still-open issues. target_status applies to the open issues (e.g. cancelled); assignments optionally re-homes them. POST /api/milestones/:id/close-with-issues.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

target_status.description: Status to apply to still-open issues

devd_milestone_create.description: WRITE: Create a milestone. name required; target_date auto-defaults (now+90d) when omitted; status defaults to new.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_milestone_delete.description: WRITE: Hard-delete a milestone. cascade=true (default) also deletes all of the milestone's sprints and their issues incl. children (no dangling rows). cascade=false only deletes the milestone and detaches its sprints (milestone_id → NULL). DELETE /api/milestones/:id[?cascade=1]. Note: cancelled is a soft state that stays in the DB — this is the hard delete.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

cascade.description: Also delete the milestone's sprints + their issues (default true). false → detach sprints only.

devd_milestone_dep_add.description: WRITE: Add a milestone dependency (predecessor must finish before successor). Routes POST /api/milestone-dependencies. DFS cycle-detection — a cycle is rejected 409 and passed through 1:1.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_milestone_dep_list.description: List a milestone dependencies: { predecessors, successors } with dependency edge id. Read-only.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_milestone_dep_remove.description: WRITE: Remove a milestone dependency edge by its dependency id (from devd_milestone_dep_list). Routes DELETE /api/milestone-dependencies/:id.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_milestone_dod_add.description: WRITE: Add a Definition-of-Done item to a milestone. POST /api/milestones/:id/dod-items {label}.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_milestone_dod_delete.description: WRITE: Delete a DoD item. DELETE /api/dod-items/:id.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_milestone_dod_list.description: List a milestone Definition-of-Done items (id, label, done, position). GET /api/milestones/:id/dod-items. Read-only.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_milestone_dod_reorder.description: WRITE: Reorder a milestone DoD items by passing item ids in the desired order. PATCH /api/milestones/:id/dod-items/reorder {order}.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

order.description: DoD item ids in the new order

devd_milestone_dod_set.description: WRITE: Update a DoD item (label and/or done). PATCH /api/dod-items/:id.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_milestone_list.description: List milestones for a project. status filter: open (default) | new | planned | in_progress | completed | cancelled | all. Read-only.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

status.description: Filter: open (default) | new | planned | in_progress | completed | cancelled | all

devd_milestone_reorder.description: WRITE: Set the display order of milestones by passing all milestone ids in the desired order (own project only). PATCH /api/milestones/reorder {ordered_ids}.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

ordered_ids.description: Milestone ids in the new order

devd_milestone_show.description: Get a single milestone with sprints, dependencies (in/out), DoD-items and issue counts. Read-only.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_milestone_status.description: WRITE: Transition a milestone status (new|planned|in_progress|completed|cancelled, incl. sanctioned reopen paths completed→in_progress / cancelled→new). Routes PUT /api/milestones/:id {status}. Lifecycle errors (e.g. 422 SPRINTS_NOT_DONE) are passed through. cancellation_notes required by the lifecycle on →cancelled.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_milestone_tag_remove.description: WRITE: Remove the given tag names from a milestone (keeps the rest). PUT /api/milestones/:id/tags.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

tags.description: Tag names to remove (array or comma string)

devd_milestone_tag_set.description: WRITE: Replace ALL tags on a milestone with the given tag names (full set; empty clears). Unknown names reported, not auto-created. PUT /api/milestones/:id/tags.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

tags.description: Tag names (array or comma string); [] / "" clears all

devd_milestone_update.description: WRITE: Update milestone master data (name / description / target_date). Routes PUT /api/milestones/:id. Empty name → 400; target_date clear → auto-default. Status changes use devd_milestone_status instead.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_project_list.description: List all projects in DevDashboard. Global — no project_id required. Compact by default (DD-622, no sstd_content/prose); fields=full for everything. Read-only.

devd_project_memory_anchor_get.description: Get the active project-memory row addressed by its anchor (D-code), e.g. "D01" / "CONTRACT-GATEWAY-PATTERN". GET /api/project-memories/anchor/:anchor. Read-only.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_project_memory_anchor_patch.description: WRITE: Patch the active project-memory addressed by its anchor (D-code) without knowing its numeric id. PATCH /api/project-memories/anchor/:anchor. Only provided fields change.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

tags.description: Tags as array or space/comma string

devd_project_memory_delete.description: WRITE: Soft-delete a project-memory (sets deleted_at; DELETE /api/project-memories/:id). Excluded from list/query/snapshot afterwards.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_project_memory_list.description: List project-bound memories (active only), optionally filtered by category. Compact by default (DD-622, no 64k content field); fields=full for everything, or devd_project_memory_show for one. Read-only.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

fields.description: DD-622: compact (default, token-safe) or full (incl. content)

devd_project_memory_log.description: WRITE: Log a project-bound memory (architecture_decision | dead_end | bug_pattern | convention | external_constraint | session_log | knowledge) into project_memories. Append-only; corrections via the supersede endpoint. Decoupled from the global ~/.claude memory.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

tags.description: Tags as array or space/comma string

source_ref.description: Reference to origin (e.g. "MEM §4 D05", issue key, commit sha)

devd_project_memory_query.description: FTS5 search over the project-bound memory store. Returns active rows (not deleted/superseded) ranked by relevance + recency, each with source_ref + validity. Special chars in the query are hardened automatically. Read-only.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_project_memory_show.description: Get a single project-bound memory by numeric id. Read-only.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_project_memory_supersede.description: WRITE: Append-only correction — creates a NEW memory row and points the old one at it via superseded_by (history preserved). POST /api/project-memories/:id/supersede. Unset fields are inherited from the existing row.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

tags.description: Tags as array or space/comma string

devd_project_memory_update.description: WRITE: Update an existing project-memory in place (PATCH /api/project-memories/:id). Only provided fields change. For append-only corrections that preserve history, use devd_project_memory_supersede instead.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

tags.description: Tags as array or space/comma string

devd_project_show.description: Get a single project by numeric id or slug. Read-only.

id_or_slug.description: Numeric project id or slug string (e.g. "devd", "2")

devd_project_sstd_get.description: Get the SSTD (Single Source of Truth Document) markdown content of a project. Resolves numeric id or slug. Returns null + hint when no SSTD set. Read-only. Followup zu DD-213.

id_or_slug.description: Numeric project id or slug string (e.g. "devd", "2")

devd_project_sstd_set.description: WRITE (DEPRECATED seit MEM-18): Whole-Rewrite des Legacy-Blobs projects.sstd_content (last-write-wins, KEIN Versions-/Diff-Schutz). Fuer granulare, token-effiziente Updates stattdessen devd_sstd_slot_set / devd_sstd_slot_edit nutzen. sstd_content=null loescht den Legacy-Blob. Followup zu DD-213.

id_or_slug.description: Numeric project id or slug string (e.g. "devd", "2")

sstd_content.description: Markdown-Inhalt (string) zum Setzen oder null zum Loeschen

devd_review_create.description: WRITE: Create a review round with verdict in ONE atomic POST (Backend nimmt review_status + comment direkt). Auto-Transitions: passed → issue passed (aus to_review/rejected); not_passed → issue rejected (aus to_review ODER passed — das Verdict führt, ein bereits-passed Issue wird zurückgezogen, DD#81-Trap-Rest-Fix). Comment Pflicht bei not_passed.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

id_or_key.description: Issue key (e.g. "DD-42") or numeric backlog id

verdict.description: Review verdict (binär seit DD-506 — partially_passed abgeschafft)

devd_review_reopen.description: WRITE: Reopen the review of a to_review issue whose last round is already decided — opens a fresh pending round and clears the sprint review-submitted marker so devd_review_create works again (no 409). Idempotent: no new round if the last round is already open. Fixes the DD#81 trap where a verdict-less sprint-review-submit locked issues in to_review with only the UI Rework button as an escape. DD-186 unchanged: adds API surface only, no permission change — setting the verdict stays a PO action.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

id_or_key.description: Issue key (e.g. "DD-42") or numeric backlog id — must be in status to_review

devd_sop_bundle.description: READ: SOP bundle for a lifecycle trigger. Returns the triggered SOP(s) full text plus — when sprint_key is given — a compact sprint header and an issue table with a blocked_by column (dependency build order). Mirrors `devd-cli sprint start` output, sourced from the DB (no filesystem). trigger e.g. "sprint:start" | "issue:create" | "sprint:create".

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

sprint_key.description: Sprint key (e.g. "DD#20") or numeric id — adds sprint header + issue table

devd_sop_collection_create.description: WRITE: Create a SOP-collection via POST /api/sop-collections. key (lowercase [a-z0-9-]) + name required; description optional. 409 if the key already exists.

devd_sop_collection_export.description: Export a SOP-collection as a single concatenated Markdown bundle (all member SOPs, ordered). Read-only.

devd_sop_collection_get.description: Get one SOP-collection by key with its full member SOPs (ordered). Read-only.

devd_sop_collection_list.description: List SOP-collections (key, name, description, sopKeys[], sop_count; no SOP content). Read-only.

devd_sop_collection_set_items.description: WRITE: Set a collection's member SOPs (replace, ordered as given) via PUT /api/sop-collections/:key/items. Unknown sop_key or collection → error.

sopKeys.description: Ordered list of SOP keys (replaces current membership)

devd_sop_create.description: WRITE: Create a new SOP via POST /api/sops. Guarded by default — errors if the key already exists (use devd_sop_edit for line changes, or force=true to overwrite the existing SOP). Requires key + title + content. SOPs are global (no project_id).

title.description: Human-readable title, e.g. "SOP - Report für markdowngetriebene Realisierungsprozesse"

force.description: Overwrite if the key already exists (default false → conflict error)

devd_sop_edit.description: WRITE: Token-efficient line edit of a SOP (analog to devd_sstd_slot_edit) — patch/insert_after/insert_before/delete a single line instead of a whole-content rewrite. expect guards the anchor line → 409 (no write) on mismatch. PATCH /api/sops/:key/line.

expect.description: Guard: current content of the anchor line (409 on mismatch)

devd_sop_get.description: Get one SOP by key. With numbered=true the content is returned as a numbered-line array (use the line numbers for devd_sop_edit). Read-only.

numbered.description: Return content as {n, text} lines for line-addressing

devd_sop_list.description: List all SOPs (metadata only — key, title, updated_at; no content). Read-only.

devd_sprint_activity.description: READ: Sprint audit-log activity (newest first). Reconciles table_name drift (sprint/sprints). GET /api/sprints/:id/activity.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_sprint_cancel.description: WRITE: Cancel a sprint with mandatory notes. Wraps PATCH /api/sprints/:id/status with to=cancelled.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

sprint_key.description: Sprint key (e.g. "DD#20") or numeric sprint id

devd_sprint_completeness.description: READ: Sprint completion — issues passed/total + percent (issues-only; no story-points in the data model). GET /api/sprints/:id/completeness.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_sprint_context.description: Get full sprint context bundle formatted as Markdown — all issue fields plus per-issue user-stories (incl. QA), result fields of already-worked issues, and issue/sprint dependencies. Ideal for AI agents before starting work, no extra calls needed. Read-only.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

sprint_key.description: Sprint key (e.g. "DD#20") or numeric sprint id

devd_sprint_create.description: WRITE: Create a new sprint in a specific project. Status starts as "new". Response includes `key` (e.g. "DD#20").

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_sprint_delete.description: WRITE: Hard-delete a sprint. cascade=true (default) also deletes the sprint's issues incl. their children (no dangling rows). cascade=false keeps the old guard: 409 if issues are still assigned (unassign/move first). DELETE /api/sprints/:id[?cascade=1]. Note: cancelled is a soft state that stays in the DB — this is the hard delete.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

sprint_key.description: Sprint key or numeric id

cascade.description: Also delete the sprint's issues (default true). false → 409 when issues exist.

devd_sprint_dep_add.description: WRITE: Add a sprint dependency (predecessor must finish before successor). Routes POST /api/sprint-dependencies. DFS cycle-detection — a cycle is rejected 409 and passed through 1:1.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_sprint_dep_list.description: List a sprint dependencies: { predecessors, successors } with dependency edge id. Read-only.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_sprint_dep_remove.description: WRITE: Remove a sprint dependency edge by its dependency id (from devd_sprint_dep_list). Routes DELETE /api/sprint-dependencies/:id.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_sprint_export.description: READ: Export one sprint (its issues) as CSV or Markdown. csv columns: id,key,title,status,type,priority,tags,completed_at. md groups issues by status. GET /api/sprints/:id/export. Read-only.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

sprint_key.description: Sprint key (e.g. "DD2#22") or numeric sprint id

devd_sprint_list.description: List sprints for a specific project. Server-side status + milestone filter. Each sprint has `key` field (e.g. "DD#20"). Read-only.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

status.description: Filter by status. Single (in_progress) or comma-list (in_progress,to_review). Valid: new | planned | in_progress | to_review | completed | cancelled

milestone_id.description: DD-554: Filter by milestone. A numeric id, or "none"/"null" for sprints WITHOUT a milestone (unassigned).

fields.description: DD-620: compact (default — identity/status fields + counts, token-safe) or full (incl. notes etc.; use devd_sprint_show for one sprint).

offset.description: DD-622: skip the first N rows (pagination)

devd_sprint_reorder.description: WRITE: Set the display order of sprints by passing all sprint ids in the desired order. PATCH /api/sprints/reorder {ordered_ids}.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

ordered_ids.description: Sprint ids in the new order

devd_sprint_rev_results.description: Get review results for all issues in a sprint (passed/not_passed/pending). Read-only.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

sprint_key.description: Sprint key (e.g. "DD#20") or numeric sprint id

devd_sprint_review.description: WRITE: Transition a sprint from in_progress → to_review (triggers PO review phase). Sprint completion (to_review → completed) is exclusive to the PO.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

sprint_key.description: Sprint key (e.g. "DD#20") or numeric sprint id

devd_sprint_set_milestone.description: WRITE: Assign a sprint to a milestone, or unassign (milestone_id=null). Routes PUT /api/sprints/:id {milestone_id}. DD-173: assigning to a completed milestone → 422 (passed through). milestone_id from a different project → 400.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

sprint_key.description: Sprint key (e.g. "DD#20") or numeric sprint id

devd_sprint_show.description: Get a single sprint with nested items (full backlog rows + review_status + screenshots). Read-only.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

sprint_key.description: Sprint key (e.g. "DD#20") or numeric sprint id

devd_sprint_start.description: WRITE: Transition a sprint from new → in_progress. Wraps PATCH /api/sprints/:id/status.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

sprint_key.description: Sprint key (e.g. "DD#20") or numeric sprint id

devd_sprint_tag_remove.description: WRITE: Remove the given tag names from a sprint (keeps the rest). PUT /api/sprints/:id/tags.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

tags.description: Tag names to remove (array or comma string)

devd_sprint_tag_set.description: WRITE: Replace ALL tags on a sprint with the given tag names (full set; empty clears). Unknown names reported, not auto-created. PUT /api/sprints/:id/tags.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

tags.description: Tag names (array or comma string); [] / "" clears all

devd_sprint_update.description: WRITE: Update sprint fields (name/goal/notes/dates/capacity/wip_limit). Only provided fields change. PUT /api/sprints/:id. Use devd_sprint_set_milestone for milestone, the status verbs for lifecycle.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

sprint_key.description: Sprint key or numeric id

devd_sstd_get.description: Get the full reassembled SSTD of a project (6 Slots + Projektionen: Naechste Schritte <- offene ToDos, Session-Log <- letzte 40 session_log-Memories). Faellt auf den Legacy-Blob projects.sstd_content zurueck, solange alle Slots leer sind. Read-only (MEM-16/18).

id_or_slug.description: Numeric project id or slug string (e.g. "devd", "2")

devd_sstd_journal_add.description: WRITE: Append a session-log entry to a project. Alias, der ein project_memory (category=session_log, Auto-Datum) anlegt — kein eigener Journal-Store (D03-rev). Erscheint in der Session-Log-Projektion von devd_sstd_get (letzte 40) (MEM-16/18, DD2-19).

id_or_slug.description: Numeric project id or slug string (e.g. "devd", "2")

content.description: Session-log entry text (wird als session_log summary gespeichert)

devd_sstd_slot_edit.description: WRITE: Line-level edit of one SSTD slot (token-effizient statt Whole-Rewrite). op=patch|insert_after|insert_before|delete, line is 1-based (insert_after erlaubt 0 = voranstellen). Optionaler expect-Guard: stimmt der aktuelle Zeileninhalt nicht, antwortet das Backend mit 409 (kein Write) (MEM-16/18).

id_or_slug.description: Numeric project id or slug string (e.g. "devd", "2")

line.description: 1-based line number (insert_after also accepts 0 to prepend)

expect.description: Guard: current content of the anchor line must match, else 409 (no write)

devd_sstd_slot_get.description: Get a single SSTD slot of a project. Read-only (MEM-16/18).

id_or_slug.description: Numeric project id or slug string (e.g. "devd", "2")

devd_sstd_slot_list.description: List all SSTD slots of a project (slot-key + raw content) in one call. Unlike devd_sstd_get (full reassembly incl. projections) this returns the raw editable slots as a list. Read-only (MEM-16/18, DD2-98).

id_or_slug.description: Numeric project id or slug string (e.g. "devd", "2")

devd_sstd_slot_set.description: WRITE: Replace a whole SSTD slot (last-write-wins). Use for the initial fill or full rewrite of one slot; for line-level edits use devd_sstd_slot_edit (MEM-16/18).

id_or_slug.description: Numeric project id or slug string (e.g. "devd", "2")

content.description: Full new markdown content of the slot

devd_subtask_add.description: WRITE: Add a subtask to an issue. title is required. qa_criteria is recommended (required before marking done).

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

id_or_key.description: Issue key (e.g. "DD-42") or numeric backlog id

qa_criteria.description: Acceptance / QA criteria — required before marking done

devd_subtask_done.description: WRITE: Mark a subtask as done. The subtask must have qa_criteria set (enforced server-side).

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_subtask_edit.description: WRITE: Update title, qa_criteria, or position of a subtask.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_subtask_list.description: READ: List all subtasks for an issue. Returns id, title, qa_criteria, status, position.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

id_or_key.description: Issue key (e.g. "DD-42") or numeric backlog id

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_tag_create.description: WRITE: Create a tag in the active project. POST /api/tags.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_tag_delete.description: WRITE: Delete a tag (cascades — removes it from all issues). DELETE /api/tags/:id.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_tag_list.description: List tags of the active project with usage counts. Read-only.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_tag_update.description: WRITE: Rename a tag or change its color. PUT /api/tags/:id.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_todo_create.description: WRITE: Create a new project todo. position = MAX+1 atomic. status defaults to "open".

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_todo_delete.description: WRITE: Delete a todo. CASCADE removes all links.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_todo_link.description: WRITE: Attach a link to a todo. type must be spec|issue|vault|url. target is validated per type (URL pattern, issue key DD-123, path-traversal reject for spec, [[/]]-reject for vault).

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_todo_list.description: List project todos. Optional status filter (open|done|cancelled). Returns each todo with its links inline. Read-only.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_todo_show.description: Get a single todo with links. Read-only.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_todo_update.description: WRITE: Update label / status / details. status must be open|done|cancelled (NOT issue lifecycle).

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_user_note_create.description: WRITE: Create a user-note (rich entity for UserNotesWidget — NOT the SSTD auto-journal). title required; details (≤500), pr_url, sprints[], issues[] optional.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_user_note_delete.description: WRITE: Delete a user-note by id (project-scoped). DELETE /api/user-notes/:id.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_user_note_get.description: Get one user-note by id (project-scoped, with parsed sprints[]/issues[]). Read-only.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_user_note_list.description: List user-notes of a project (id DESC). Optional FTS search over title+details. Read-only.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_user_note_update.description: WRITE: Partial update of a user-note (at least one field). PUT /api/user-notes/:id.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_user_story_add.description: WRITE: Add a user story (Pruefgrundlage) to an issue. title is required. qa is the per-story acceptance/QA criteria (replaces the old issue-level acceptance_criteria/test_instruction, D09). us_verdict starts at open.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

id_or_key.description: Issue key (e.g. "DD-42") or numeric backlog id

details.description: Optional detail / narrative of the story

devd_user_story_edit.description: WRITE: Update title, details, qa, position, or us_verdict (open|accepted|rejected) of a user story.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_user_story_list.description: READ: List all user stories for an issue. Returns id, key (US-<id>), title, details, qa, us_verdict, position.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

id_or_key.description: Issue key (e.g. "DD-42") or numeric backlog id

devd_user_story_remove.description: WRITE: Delete a user story permanently.

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.

devd_user_story_verdict.description: WRITE: Set the story-level verdict (open|accepted|rejected) of a user story (review context, per-US toggle).

project_id.description: Project id or slug for X-Project-Id header (e.g. "7", "devd"). Falls back to DEVD_PROJECT_ID env if unset. Required when env is unset.
